welcome.heroSubtitle: Get instant, accurate analysis of skin conditions using advanced deep learning technology. Your personal AI dermatology assistant, available 24/7.
welcome.whatIsBody1: Skin Disease Classifier is an advanced AI-powered tool that helps you identify potential skin conditions from photos. Using state-of-the-art deep learning technology trained on over 262,000 dermatological images, our system can analyze skin lesions and provide predictions about 35 different skin conditions.
welcome.whatIsBody2: Whether you're concerned about a new mole, rash, or other skin change, our AI can provide instant insights to help you understand your skin health better. Remember, this tool is for educational purposes and should complement, not replace, professional medical advice.
welcome.step1Desc: Create your free account in seconds
welcome.step2Desc: Take or upload a clear photo of your skin concern
welcome.step3Desc: Our AI analyzes the image instantly
welcome.feature2Desc: Get instant results in seconds, not days or weeks
welcome.feature3Desc: Your images are processed securely and privately
welcome.feature4Desc: Learn about skin conditions with comprehensive guides
welcome.feature5Desc: Monitor your skin health journey over time
welcome.feature6Desc: Accessible skin health analysis for everyone
welcome.disclaimerBody: This application is for educational purposes only and does not provide medical advice. AI predictions should never replace professional medical diagnosis. Always consult a qualified dermatologist for any skin concerns. If you notice rapidly changing moles, persistent sores, or other concerning symptoms, seek immediate medical attention.
welcome.footerText: © 2025 Skin Disease Classifier | For Educational Purposes Only
welcome.footerSub: Always consult a healthcare professional for medical advice
